overall_classification.summary: The project has a credible deterministic demo path, real local QwenPaw advisory evidence, and passing local tests, but it still lacks the repository, security, deployment, data, and operations controls expected of a commercial application.

readiness_scale.name: Demo-grade MVP
readiness_scale.definition: Locally runnable and evidence-backed, but demo credentials, local state, manual verification, or optional provider probes remain central.

readiness_scale.name: Evidence-backed audit pack
readiness_scale.definition: Commercial gaps are explicitly mapped to evidence and remediation tasks, but production controls are not yet implemented.

readiness_scale.name: Private beta candidate
readiness_scale.definition: CI, dependency hygiene, migrations, environment policy, session hardening, smoke deployment, and basic observability are implemented.

readiness_scale.name: Commercial launch candidate
readiness_scale.definition: Tenant isolation, production secrets, monitoring, incident response, backups, release gates, and external integrations are operationally owned.

evidence: root_github_directory_present=false
origin_main_commit_statuses=[]
origin_main_workflow_runs=[]
p0_gaps.risk: Passing local tests are not enough for a collaborative or deployable release flow.

evidence: 14 historical screenshot PNG files are dirty in the local worktree
tracked_web_node_modules_count=0
p0_gaps.risk: Verification byproducts can accidentally enter release commits and make diffs hard to review.

evidence: Demo accounts and password are seeded for local use
Frontend sends fixed X-Zhiyin-CSRF demo header
Session cookie is local-demo oriented
p0_gaps.risk: The auth layer is suitable for demo control, not for external users or production traffic.

evidence: Default backend store is SQLite
Persistence uses a generic records table
No Alembic migration workflow is present
p0_gaps.risk: The data layer is difficult to evolve safely and is not ready for production concurrency, backups, or schema change control.

evidence: No production deployment manifest was verified in v1.9
Live QwenPaw remains localhost-only and manual
Qwen/QwenPaw are optional advisory probes
p0_gaps.risk: There is no repeatable production deployment or environment promotion path.

evidence: v1.3 deterministic live demo remains the reliable demo path
v1.8.1 QwenPaw evidence proves local advisory qualification only
QwenPaw does not approve, publish, mutate authoritative state, or create coupon/redemption records
p0_gaps.risk: Overstating QwenPaw as production orchestration would misrepresent the system.
p0_gaps.recommended_next_phase: Keep claim boundaries in every demo and investor-facing artifact

evidence: npm.cmd run build passes
main JS chunk is 841.37 kB and triggers Vite large chunk warning
p1_gaps.risk: The app can be slow to load on mobile networks and lacks a strict performance budget.
p1_gaps.recommended_next_phase: Route-level code splitting and bundle budget enforcement

evidence: No runtime metrics, tracing, or alerting configuration was verified in v1.9
p1_gaps.risk: Failures in live demo or beta operation would be hard to diagnose after the fact.
p1_gaps.recommended_next_phase: Add structured request logs, smoke result retention, and health endpoint checks

evidence: v1.3 live demo smoke exists and previously verified real backend state
v1.9 reran unit/integration suites and build, not the live Playwright smoke
p1_gaps.risk: The local live path is proven historically but not enforced as a required release check.
p1_gaps.recommended_next_phase: Promote the v1.3 live smoke into CI or documented release gate

evidence: No real merchant, POS, payment, hardware, map, weather, traffic, or visitor identity integration is implemented
p1_gaps.risk: The product remains a controlled workflow prototype rather than a deployable city or merchant platform.
p1_gaps.recommended_next_phase: Pick one narrow integration only after CI, auth, persistence, and deployment are hardened

validated_strengths.evidence: API full test suite, web Vitest suite, and production build passed locally in v1.9.
v1.8.1 records real local advisory qualification while preserving advisory-only and localhost-only boundaries.
Prior verification keeps raw Agent, QwenPaw, model, and backend terms out of merchant, tourist, and public H5 pages.
v1.9 explicitly separates historical screenshot PNG byproducts from the audit-pack commit scope.

recommended_next_phase.objective: Turn the CR-P0-001 and CR-P0-002 gaps into enforceable repository controls before product hardening continues.
minimum_scope: Add GitHub Actions for API tests, web tests, and web build
Add changed-file hygiene checks for secrets, local absolute paths, and generated PNG scope
Document release commands and required checks
Resolve or intentionally quarantine historical screenshot PNG diffs
